nodes.name: A01 — Monday 06:00 Content Kick-off
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 06:00. Plans Rick.AI weekly thought leadership content across X, LinkedIn, YouTube.

nodes.name: A02 — Search: AI Dev Trends
nodes.notes: Searches for AI app development trends, new Claude/OpenAI features, and indie builder news.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: Claude AI Anthropic new features {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}

nodes.name: A03 — Search: Claude/Anthropic News
nodes.notes: Fetches latest Claude and Anthropic news for timely content hooks.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 4000,
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": "You are the content strategist for Rick.AI — an AI app development studio run by Ricky Barton in the UK. We build production AI apps (10+ shipped).

Current AI trends: {{ $node['A02 — Search: AI Dev Trends'].json.web.results.map(r => r.title).join('; ') }}
Claude/Anthropic news: {{ $node['A03 — Search: Claude/Anthropic News'].json.web.results.map(r => r.title).join('; ') }}

Portfolio: CoachMentor (AI coaching platform), Manager Mentor (computer vision football analysis), Dream 4-4-2 (fantasy PL), THRYVE/KODA/HALO (AI fitness), PrimeHaul (AI lead gen), Astra Removals (business platform + SEO), StorySync (AI video gen), CellSynergy CNS (biometrics).

Generate a 7-day content plan in JSON with this structure:
{
  "theme": "Week theme",
  "content": [
    {
      "day": "Monday",
      "platform": "X",
      "type": "thread",
      "pillar": "Build Log|AI Tutorial|Tech Stack|Project Showcase|Industry Insight",
      "title": "Thread title",
      "hook": "First tweet (must be attention-grabbing, <280 chars)",
      "thread_points": ["Point 1", "Point 2", "Point 3"],
      "cta": "Call to action",
      "schedule": "HH:MM"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- Mon/Wed/Fri: X threads (Build Log, AI Tutorial, Industry Insight)
- Tue: LinkedIn article/post (professional, B2B focused)
- Wed: Instagram carousel/post (visual, behind-the-scenes, project showcase)
- Thu: Short-form video script (60s, dev tip or project walkthrough for TikTok/Reels)
- Fri: Facebook post (community-focused, shareable, broader audience)
- Sat: Pinterest pin (project showcase, infographic, visual portfolio piece)
- Sun: Rest
- All times in UK timezone (BST/GMT)
- Best posting times: X 08:00-09:00 or 17:00-18:00, LinkedIn 07:30-08:30, Instagram 11:00-13:00, Facebook 09:00-11:00, Pinterest 20:00-22:00, YouTube 12:00-14:00
- Tone: Builder/indie hacker, technical but accessible, show real code/results
- Reference actual projects and real numbers where possible
- Hook MUST be under 280 chars and create curiosity

Return ONLY the JSON, no markdown fencing."
  }]
}

nodes.name: A04 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan
nodes.notes: Claude generates a full 7-day content plan based on trends and portfolio context. Returns structured JSON.

nodes.name: A05 — Quality Gate: ≥5 Content Items
nodes.notes: Ensures Claude generated at least 5 content items for the week. Rejects incomplete plans.

nodes.name: A06 — Airtable: Log Weekly Plan
nodes.notes: Logs the weekly content plan to Airtable CRM for tracking.

nodes.name: A07 — Post X: Monday Thread
nodes.notes: Posts the Monday X thread hook. Thread replies follow via the Twitter API reply chain.

nodes.name: A08 — Post LinkedIn: Tuesday Article
nodes.notes: Posts Tuesday LinkedIn thought leadership content via the Posts API (v2). B2B focused, professional tone.

nodes.name: A09 — Create IG Media Container: Wednesday
nodes.notes: Step 1 of 2-step Instagram publish for Wednesday content. Creates media container with branded image.

nodes.name: A09b — Wait 30s (IG Processing)
nodes.notes: Instagram requires a brief wait after container creation before publishing.

nodes.name: A09c — Publish IG Post: Wednesday
nodes.notes: Step 2: publishes the IG media container for Wednesday Instagram post.

string.name: video_script
string.value: ={{ JSON.parse($node['A04 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan'].json.content[0].text).content.filter(c => c.day === 'Thursday')[0].hook }}

string.name: video_points
string.value: ={{ JSON.parse($node['A04 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan'].json.content[0].text).content.filter(c => c.day === 'Thursday')[0].thread_points.join(' | ') }}

string.name: video_cta
string.value: ={{ JSON.parse($node['A04 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan'].json.content[0].text).content.filter(c => c.day === 'Thursday')[0].cta }}

string.name: tiktok_status
string.value: PLACEHOLDER — TikTok/Reels API approval pending. Script saved for manual posting.

nodes.name: A10 — Thursday: Short-Form Video Script (TikTok/Reels Placeholder)
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER NODE: TikTok/Reels API requires app approval. Once approved, replace with TikTok Content Posting API call (POST https://open.tiktokapis.com/v2/post/publish/content/init/). Script is saved for manual posting and logged to Airtable.

nodes.name: A11 — Post Facebook: Friday
nodes.notes: Posts Friday Facebook content to the Rick.AI page. Community-focused, shareable content for broader audience.

nodes.name: A12 — Post Pinterest: Saturday Pin
nodes.notes: Creates a pin on the Rick.AI portfolio board via Pinterest API v5. Project showcase or infographic content.

nodes.name: B01 — Every 8h: Check Engagement
nodes.notes: Runs every 8 hours to check engagement metrics on X and LinkedIn.

nodes.name: B02 — Fetch X Profile Metrics
nodes.notes: Gets current follower count, tweet count, and engagement metrics from X.

nodes.name: B03 — Fetch X Mentions
nodes.notes: Gets recent mentions and replies for lead identification.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 1000,
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": "Classify these social media mentions for Rick.AI (AI app development studio).

Mentions:
{{ $json.data ? $json.data.map(m => m.text).join('
---
') : 'No mentions' }}

For each mention, return JSON array:
[{"text": "...", "intent": "lead|question|praise|spam", "urgency": "high|medium|low", "suggested_reply": "..."}]

- lead: Someone asking about building an AI app, needing a developer, or expressing interest in our services
- question: Technical question about AI/dev (good for visibility, reply with value)
- praise: Positive feedback (like + reply with thanks)
- spam: Irrelevant

Return ONLY the JSON array."
  }]
}

nodes.name: B04 — Claude: Classify Mentions
nodes.notes: Claude Haiku classifies mentions by intent: lead, question, praise, or spam. Leads trigger CRM entry.

nodes.name: B05 — Lead Detected?
nodes.notes: Routes to Airtable CRM if any mentions are classified as leads.

nodes.name: B06 — Airtable: Log Lead
nodes.notes: Logs detected leads to Airtable CRM with source, description, and auto-tagged status.

nodes.name: B07 — Slack: Lead Alert
nodes.notes: Sends Slack notification with lead details and suggested reply for fast response.

main.node: A04 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan
A04 — Claude: Generate Weekly Content Plan
A09 — Create IG Media Container: Wednesday
A10 — Thursday: Short-Form Video Script (TikTok/Reels Placeholder)

_readme.description: Two-workflow social automation engine: (A) Weekly thought leadership content generation and publishing across 6 platforms, (B) Engagement monitoring and lead capture from X mentions.
_readme.trigger_a: Cron — every Monday at 06:00 UK time
required_credentials: Anthropic API Key (httpHeaderAuth) — x-api-key header for Claude Sonnet + Haiku
X/Twitter OAuth 1.0a (oAuth1Api) — for posting threads and reading mentions
LinkedIn API Token (httpHeaderAuth) — Bearer token for Posts API v2
Airtable API Token (httpHeaderAuth) — for CRM logging
Brave Search API (httpHeaderAuth) — for trend research
Pinterest API Token (httpHeaderAuth) — Bearer token for pin creation
Facebook Page Access Token (env var) — for page feed posting
Instagram Access Token (env var) — for media container publish flow
Slack Bot Token (slackApi) — for lead alerts
required_env_vars: AIRTABLE_BASE_ID_RICKAI — Airtable base ID for Rick.AI CRM
LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID_RICKAI — LinkedIn person URN ID for Ricky's profile
FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN_RICKAI — Long-lived Facebook page access token
RICKAI_DEFAULT_IMAGE_URL — Public URL of default branded image for IG posts
RICKAI_PINTEREST_IMAGE_URL — Public URL of Pinterest pin image (2:3 ratio recommended)
PINTEREST_BOARD_ID_RICKAI — Pinterest board ID for Rick.AI portfolio pins
setup_steps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Settings > Import Workflow)
2. Set all environment variables in n8n Settings > Environment Variables

3. Create credentials: Anthropic (httpHeaderAuth with x-api-key), X/Twitter (OAuth 1.0a), LinkedIn (httpHeaderAuth with Bearer token), Airtable (httpHeaderAuth), Brave Search (httpHeaderAuth), Pinterest (httpHeaderAuth with Bearer token)
4. Create 'Content Automation Runs' and 'Leads' tables in your Airtable base
5. Configure Facebook Page and Instagram Business Account in Meta Business Suite
6. Create a Pinterest board for Rick.AI portfolio content
7. Upload branded images to public CDN for IG and Pinterest defaults
8. Test Workflow A with a manual trigger on Monday morning
9. Test Workflow B by sending a test mention on X
11. Once TikTok API is approved, replace placeholder node A10 with TikTok Content Posting API call
_readme.tiktok_note: TikTok Business API requires app approval (1-2 weeks). Once approved: replace node A10 with POST to https://open.tiktokapis.com/v2/post/publish/content/init/ with video upload flow. Script is stored in Airtable for manual posting until then.
